title: InvoiceRow.expires_at accepts unvalidated String bypassing DateTime guard
description: store.rs create_invoice takes InvoiceRow.expires_at as String (line 700). set_subscription takes DateTime<Utc> and formats internally (line 591) — this design was intentional to prevent silent format mismatches (DESIGN.md section 9). create_invoice bypasses this guard: callers must format expires_at correctly as YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS manually. ws.rs SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST formats correctly (line 1810), but the InvoiceRow struct provides no compile-time guarantee. A future caller using rfc3339 would produce an invoice whose expiry comparison silently fails.
